TYPES.FPCLINE: tt_konv TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_konv.
* tt_vbak TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF vbak.

INITIALIZATION.FPCLINE: READ TABLE IT_FINAL INTO WA_FINAL INDEX 1.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM ADRC INTO LS_ADRC_AG
SELECT SINGLE * FROM ADRC INTO LS_ADRC_WE
READ TABLE IT_FINAL INTO WA_FINAL INDEX 1.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM VBAK INTO GV_VBAK
SELECT SINGLE * FROM VBKD INTO GV_VBKD
LV_LINES TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF TLINE,
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE GV_PO WA_LINES-TDLINE INTO GV_PO SEPARATED BY SPACE.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'ZZ99' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = DATA(lv_lines1) ).
SELECT SINGLE * FROM VBAP INTO WA_VBAP
WHERE VBELN = WA_FINAL-VBELN AND POSNR = WA_FINAL-POSNR.
SELECT SINGLE WRKST INTO US_CODE FROM MARA WHERE
SELECT SINGLE * FROM VBAP INTO WA_VBAP
WHERE VBELN = WA_FINAL-VBELN AND POSNR = WA_FINAL-POSNR.
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* READ TABLE IT_LINES INTO WA_LINES INDEX 1.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = '0010' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBP' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
SELECT SINGLE * FROM VBAP INTO WA_VBAP
WHERE VBELN = WA_FINAL-VBELN AND POSNR = WA_FINAL-POSNR.
*SELECT SINGLE OFM_DATE FROM VBAP INTO GV_OFM_DATE WHERE VBELN = WA_FINAL-VBELN.
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'Z999' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'Z020' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBk' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'Z103' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
SELECT VBELN KNUMV FROM VBAK INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE IT_VBAK
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE IT_KONV
LOOP AT IT_VBAK INTO WA_VBAK WHERE VBELN = LV_VBELN.
READ TABLE IT_KONV INTO WA_KONV WITH KEY KNUMV = WA_VBAK-KNUMV.
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE GV_TAG WA_LINES-TDLINE INTO GV_TAG SEPARATED BY SPACE.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'Z039' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE GV_TPI WA_LINES-TDLINE INTO GV_TPI SEPARATED BY SPACE.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'Z999' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE GV_INSURANCE WA_LINES-TDLINE INTO GV_INSURANCE SEPARATED BY SPACE.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'Z017' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE GV_MODE_DESP WA_LINES-TDLINE INTO GV_MODE_DESP SEPARATED BY SPACE.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'Z018' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE GV_LD_AP WA_LINES-TDLINE INTO GV_LD_AP SEPARATED BY SPACE.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'Z038' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE GV_INCO WA_LINES-TDLINE INTO GV_INCO SEPARATED BY SPACE.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'Z019' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE GV_TERMS WA_LINES-TDLINE INTO GV_TERMS SEPARATED BY SPACE.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'Z101' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE LV_TEXT LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO LV_TEXT SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE LV_TEXT LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO LV_TEXT SEPARATED BY SPACE.
* REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<(>'IN LV_REC WITH ''.
* REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<)>'IN LV_REC WITH ''.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'Z020' name = LV_TEXTNAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
LV_TOTAL_AMT = LV_BASE_AMT + LV_PF_AMT + LV_INS_VAL + LV_FRG_VAL + WA_FINAL2-KBETR .
SELECT SINGLE * FROM VBAP INTO WA_VBAP
WHERE VBELN = WA_FINAL2-VBELN AND POSNR = WA_FINAL2-POSNR.
MODIFY IT_FINAL2 FROM WA_FINAL2 TRANSPORTING OFM_DATE . "DPVAL CCVAL.
